cards.back: A message sent from an application component to another component, or to a system service
A mechanism that allows an application component to specify which intents it can handle
The sequence of events an activity goes through during its lifetime, including creation, resume, pause, and destruction
The sequence of events a broadcast message goes through during its lifetime, including creation, sending, and reception
A return code sent from an activity to its caller when a request for action has been completed
